case_title: SULINA CHEUNG VS. PRINTING INDUSTRIES BENEFIT TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, SULINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRINTING INDUSTRIES BENEFIT TRUST HUMANADENTAL INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2010 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $97.00 FILED BY CHEUNG, SULINA AS TO DEFENDANT PRINTING INDUSTRIES BENEFIT TRUST HUMANADENTAL INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, SULINA AS TO DEFENDANT HUMANADENTAL INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-30-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUMANADENTAL INSURANCE COMPANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, SULINA AS TO DEFENDANT PRINTING INDUSTRIES BENEFIT TRUST
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-10-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINTING INDUSTRIES BENEFIT TRUST

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HUMANA. DEFENDANT PRINTING INDUSTRIES NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
